display.purpose: Hero h1 only. Spectral at clamp(2.5rem, 5vw + 1rem, 4.5rem).

body.purpose: Prose, UI labels, form fields. Source Sans 3 at 1.0625rem, max 42rem measure.

label.purpose: Mono metadata, practice index numbers, attributions. Uppercase, 0.04em tracking.

shadows.name: dropdown-panel
shadows.purpose: Mobile navigation menu panel only — functional overlay, not card decoration.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for color, border, and hero entrance transitions.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover and focus state transitions on links, buttons, inputs.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Hero entrance fade — disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action — header, hero, form submit. One per viewport zone.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.375rem; font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; color: var(--color-on-primary, oklch(0.99 0.005 250)); background: var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); border: 1px solid var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-hover, oklch(0.38 0.1 252)); border-color: var(--color-primary-hover, oklch(0.38 0.1 252)); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary outlined action when a filled primary is already present.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.375rem; font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.88 0.012 250)); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact form text field — stroke border, tonal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-field-label { font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); } .ds-input { font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.0625rem; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); background: var(--color-bg, oklch(1 0 0)); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.88 0.012 250)); border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.75rem 0.875rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.44 0.09 252 / 0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.46 0.022 250)); }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Sticky header with brand, inline links, and primary CTA.
components.html:
Estudio AlcántaraMadrid · Desde 1987
ÁreasEnfoqueEquipo
Contactar
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; min-height: 4.25rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.92); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.88 0.012 250)); } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.15rem; text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); margin-right: auto; } .ds-nav-name { font-family: var(--font-display, Spectral, serif); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-nav-meta { font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.46 0.022 250)); } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; } .ds-nav-links a { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); } .ds-nav-cta { text-decoration: none; }

components.name: Practice Index Row
components.description: Signature typographic list — mono index, ruled dividers, no icon cards.
components.html:
01

Derecho mercantil

Constitución de sociedades, pactos entre socios, operaciones corporativas.
components.css: .ds-practice-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 3rem 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 2.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.88 0.012 250)); align-items: start; } .ds-practice-index { font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.46 0.022 250)); padding-top: 0.35rem; } .ds-practice-title { font-family: var(--font-display, Spectral, serif); font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 1vw + 0.75rem, 1.375rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.12; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-practice-desc { font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.46 0.022 250)); margin: 0; max-width: 52ch; }

components.name: FAQ Accordion Item
components.description: Native details/summary accordion with mono expand marker.
components.html:
¿Cómo es la primera reunión?

Dura entre cuarenta y sesenta minutos. Sin compromiso de contratación.
components.css: .ds-faq { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.88 0.012 250)); } .ds-faq-q { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1.5rem 0; font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-ink, oklch(0.2 0.025 250)); cursor: pointer; list-style: none; } .ds-faq-q::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-faq-q::after { content: '+'; font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 400; color: var(--color-primary, oklch(0.44 0.09 252)); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-faq[open] .ds-faq-q::after { content: '−'; } .ds-faq-a { padding-bottom: 1.5rem; } .ds-faq-a p { font-family: var(--font-body, 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.46 0.022 250)); margin: 0; max-width: 58ch; }

components.name: Contact Form Panel
components.description: Tonal surface container for contact fields — no border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-contact-panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 2.5rem; background: var(--color-surface, oklch(0.965 0.008 250)); border-radius: 12px; }

components.name: Mono Label
components.description: Firm metadata and section indices — uppercase mono with tracking.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: var(--font-mono, 'JetBrains Mono', monospace); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.46 0.022 250)); }

narrative.overview: A law firm's credibility expressed through editorial typography and grid discipline — not through legal stock imagery or sales pressure. The implemented system borrows from Swiss institutional sites: structured, breathable, precise. Warmth arrives through proportion, readable copy, and restrained accent use, not through cream backgrounds or decorative clichés. Motion responds to interaction — hover, focus, and a single hero entrance feel considered, never choreographed for spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained palette: cool institutional slate on pure white and cool-mist surfaces; accent ≤10% of any screen
Spectral display + Source Sans 3 body + JetBrains Mono labels — authority through typographic contrast
Flat-by-default surfaces; depth via Paper → Surface tonal steps and ruled dividers, not ghost-card shadows
Swiss grid discipline with generous editorial whitespace and fluid clamp() section rhythm
Mobile-first: sticky header, native details navigation and FAQ, WCAG AA contrast as a design constraint

rules.name: The Restrained Rule
rules.body: Tinted cool neutrals carry the surface. Institutional Slate appears on ≤10% of any given screen — primary CTAs, links, focus rings, FAQ markers. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Navy-Gold Rule
rules.body: If the palette reads as "default law firm template," the slate has drifted too warm or too saturated. Pull back toward cool, desaturated institutional tones.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: Body backgrounds must not land in the warm-neutral band (cream, sand, parchment, linen). Warmth is carried by typography and accent placement, not by a tinted page wash.

rules.name: The Display Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Hero type never exceeds 4.5rem at max clamp (well under the 6rem ceiling). Editorial restraint whispers.

rules.name: The Mono Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Monospace accents metadata and structure — not body paragraphs. One mono voice per screen section at most.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to functional overlay state (dropdown), never as resting card decoration.

rules.name: The No Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair border: 1px solid with wide soft box-shadows (blur ≥16px). Pick one surface treatment: a defined border at Rule Line, or a tight functional shadow (≤8px blur), never both as decoration.

dos: Do keep body text contrast at ≥4.5:1 against its background — Brief Ink on Paper, Registry Muted verified on both Paper and Cool Mist Surface.
Do use Institutional Slate sparingly: one primary CTA per zone, links, focus rings, FAQ markers.
Do let typography, ruled dividers, and whitespace establish hierarchy before reaching for containers or cards.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion: reduce alternatives — hero entrance disabled, scroll-behavior auto.
Do test headline copy at every breakpoint — display clamp max is 4.5rem; reduce or rewrite if words overflow.
donts: Don't use generic law-firm templates: stock gavels, scales of justice heroes, navy-and-gold palettes, rotating sliders.
Don't ship AI slop: cream/sand body backgrounds, gradient text, identical icon-card grids, eyebrow kickers on every section.
Don't use aggressive sales patterns: pop-ups, "FREE CONSULTATION" banners, fake urgency, lead capture before trust.
Don't build cold corporate walls: sterile stock photography, undifferentiated service copy blocks.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or glassmorphism as default decoration.
Don't over-round containers (max 12px radius on panels and images); reserve full pills for tags and buttons only.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft drop shadows on the same element — the ghost-card tell.
